name: Plexoval II platelet extracellular vesicle wound-healing phase I trial
summary: Randomized double-blind placebo-controlled within-person phase I trial testing LEAP-purified allogeneic platelet-derived extracellular vesicles in healthy-volunteer punch-biopsy wounds.
population: Healthy adult volunteers with two induced punch-biopsy wounds

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Extracellular Vesicle and Secretome Therapies because they can show whether the intervention changes safety and function in Healthy adult volunteers with two induced punch-biopsy wounds. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
